#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay')

## ReplayEventEnvelope Class

Wire shape of a single persisted event passed to a domain replay endpoint\. Carries
the metadata fields required to drive Apply via the runtime convention plus the
raw payload bytes\. Intentionally narrower than the storage envelope: only fields
the Apply path or replay diagnostics consume\.

```csharp
public sealed record ReplayEventEnvelope : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.ReplayEventEnvelope>
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; ReplayEventEnvelope

## ReplayEventEnvelope\(long, string, byte\[\], string, int, string, string, string\) Constructor

Wire shape of a single persisted event passed to a domain replay endpoint\. Carries
the metadata fields required to drive Apply via the runtime convention plus the
raw payload bytes\. Intentionally narrower than the storage envelope: only fields
the Apply path or replay diagnostics consume\.

```csharp
public ReplayEventEnvelope(long SequenceNumber, string EventTypeName, byte[] Payload, string SerializationFormat, int MetadataVersion, string MessageId, string? CorrelationId, string? CausationId);
```
